title: Verquvo (vericiguat) tablets measured dose — heading 3004 Free
source: CROSS NY N318947 (14 May 2021) — Verquvo Tablets dosage form → 3004.90.9220, rate of duty Free. Same letter as Vericiguat bulk at 6.5%.

value_note.contrast: Bulk vericiguat on the same letter is 6.5% MFN — honest same-letter dollar delta if origin does not erase it via preference
